title: Hezbollah rejects Israel-Lebanon ceasefire — Naim Qassem: 'surrender, defeat'; demands full Israeli withdrawal as nonnegotiable
snippet: Hezbollah Secretary-General Naim Qassem rejected the ceasefire deal agreed between Israel and Lebanon, calling demands that fighters leave southern Lebanon 'surrender, defeat, and achieving enemy's goals.' He stated: 'We are concerned only with a comprehensive cessation of aggression.' The rejection came hours after the June 3 pilot zones agreement was announced in Washington.
tag_reason: 이전 7일 소스에 헤즈볼라의 파일럿 존 합의 거부에 대한 보도 없음. 6/3 합의(src-1563) 이후 최초의 헤즈볼라 공식 반응
